extracted.title: Bison XPress Project Update
extracted.description:
As a courtesy, Bison Pipeline LLC, by its Operator TransCanada Northern Border Inc., (BSN) provices customers with this update concerning the anticipated In-Service date of the Bison XPress Project (the "Project")

At this time, Norther Border Pipeline Company, by its Operator TransCanada Northern Border Inc., (NBPL) has identified a potential delay in the previously anticipated Project In-Service date of March 1, 2026. Based on the current construction forecast, the revised Projected In-Service is currently projected to be by May 1, 2026. BSN will provide customers with updates concerning the revised anticipated Project In-Service date as available and appropriate.

Please contact your Customer Services Representative with any questions.

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Reference Documents and FAQs
BSX_Update_Notice_BSN EBB_final_17Dec2025.pdf
